steps.description: Enrichment on ranked genes or DE hits.

plan.success_criteria: Significant pathway enrichment or coherent DE pattern matching the biological process named in the hypothesis.
plan.failure_criteria: No significant enrichment after multiple-testing correction.

execution_trace.description: Enrichment on ranked genes or DE hits.

plan.success_criteria: Significant pathway enrichment or coherent DE pattern matching the biological process named in the hypothesis.
plan.failure_criteria: No significant enrichment after multiple-testing correction.

interpretation.summary: Observed statistically significant separation consistent with pathway-level differential expression; caveats on confounding remain.
follow_ups: Validate top hits with orthogonal database evidence
Check correlation of DE with technical covariates
